home.title: Your AI firm.
home.subtitle: Each pipeline is a team of agents. Open it to see its org chart, edit each role, and choose the model and system prompt.
home.emptyBody: Preset pipelines are seeded on first load. If nothing appears, reload to restart generation.
home.emptyKeysBody: The board orchestrates agents that call models with your keys. Head to {link}Settings › Providers{/link} to add one.

tryButton.label: Try it
tryButton.callsTitle: {count, plural, one {~# LLM call per question} other {~# LLM calls per question}}

samplePrompts.chat-simple: Summarize the main duties of a company officer in a French SAS.
samplePrompts.recherche-juridique: What are the conditions for the validity of a post-contractual non-compete clause under employment law?
samplePrompts.redaction-actes: Draft a formal notice for non-payment of a 30-day services invoice.
samplePrompts.revue-contractuelle: Analyze the following clause: "The Client expressly waives any claim against the Provider beyond the amount invoiced over the last 3 months."
samplePrompts.comite-strategique: My client wants to unilaterally terminate a 5-year exclusive distribution contract after 18 months. What are the risks?
samplePrompts.audit-conformite: Assess the compliance of an automated candidate scoring tool used for recruitment.
samplePrompts.le-bureau: A protected employee was dismissed without authorization from the labor inspectorate. What remedies, what deadlines, and prepare a draft letter to the client.

pipelineBoard.noAgents: This pipeline has no configured agent.

editSheet.title: Edit agent
editSheet.roleChangeWarning: Changing the role updates the agent's "factory" prompt and default tools. Your custom system prompt is preserved.
editSheet.inheritOption: Inherit from chat (key chosen at send time)
editSheet.providerHelp: Lets you assign a different provider/model per agent — for example Mistral-small for the Reviewer, Claude for the Maestro.
editSheet.tempHelp: Provider default temperature — suits most uses. Switch to "Custom" for a very factual Reviewer (low) or a more creative Drafter (high).
editSheet.promptWarning: This prompt is repeated on every call to this agent — a long prompt multiplies costs in council/parallel mode.
editSheet.promptHelp: Empty = the role's "factory" prompt. The longer the prompt, the more each call costs.
editSheet.noToolsAvailable: No tool available — configure a connector or an MCP server.
editSheet.toolsHelpAll: The agent can use all available tools.
editSheet.toolsHelpNone: No tool — the agent works on text only.
editSheet.toolsHelpSelected: {count, plural, one {# tool selected} other {# tools selected}}.
editSheet.noFolders: No folder — create one in the Documents tab.
editSheet.ragHelpInherit: The agent reads the documents of the conversation's project (default).
editSheet.ragHelpNone: The agent reads no document — it works without document retrieval.
editSheet.ragHelpFolders: {count, plural, one {# folder selected} other {# folders selected}} — intersected with the conversation's project scope.
editSheet.ragHelpDocuments: {count, plural, one {# document selected} other {# documents selected}} — intersected with the conversation's project scope.

pipelineActions.deleteDescription: This action is irreversible. Conversations that used this pipeline keep their history but will no longer be able to invoke it.
pipelineActions.renameDescription: Name and description changes are visible in the chat's pipeline selector.

cloneToEdit.clonedDesc: You can now edit each agent.
cloneToEdit.label: Clone to edit

modeHint.sequential: Chain: each agent sees the previous agents' output. The last agent returns the final answer.
modeHint.council: Council: all agents deliberate (N rounds). The last agent — the terminal one — synthesizes and returns the answer.
modeHint.parallel: Parallel: agents work on the question at the same time. The last agent — the terminal one — aggregates and returns the answer.
modeHint.iterative: Iterative: the first agent revisits its notes each round to dig into the gaps. The last agent — the terminal one — synthesizes and returns the answer.
modeHint.maestro: Maestro: the last agent leads the team — it chooses who to consult, with which instructions, in the order it sees fit, then returns the answer. The order below is only indicative.

modeBar.roundsOption: {count, plural, one {# debate round} other {# debate rounds}}
modeBar.costEstimate: {count, plural, one {Estimated cost: # LLM call per question} other {Estimated cost: # LLM calls per question}} — {breakdown}
modeBar.breakdownCouncil: {debaters, plural, one {# debater} other {# debaters}} over {rounds, plural, one {# round} other {# rounds}}, plus 1 final synthesis.
modeBar.breakdownIterative: {rounds, plural, one {# round} other {# rounds}} of deepening{multi, select, yes {, plus 1 final synthesis.} other {.}}
modeBar.breakdownParallel: {debaters, plural, one {# agent} other {# agents}} in parallel, plus 1 final synthesis.
modeBar.breakdownMaestro: estimate — the Maestro decides on the fly who to consult ({debaters, plural, one {# agent available} other {# agents available}}, recalls possible).
modeBar.presetLocked: Mode locked on presets — clone the pipeline to change it.

editorPage.presetTitle: This pipeline is a system preset — read-only.
editorPage.presetBody: To customize its agents (model, prompt, tools), clone it in one click. Your copy will be editable and immediately usable in chat.
editorPage.hintClickAgent: Click an agent to edit it
editorPage.hintOrder: · The order is set in "Execution order" below
editorPage.hintRounds: {count, plural, one {· # debate round} other {· # debate rounds}}
editorPage.hintAudit: · Every run is recorded in the audit

addAgent.nameRequired: Give the agent a name (e.g. "Business lawyer").
addAgent.addedDesc: {name} is now part of the pipeline.
addAgent.heading: Add an agent
addAgent.description: You can refine its system prompt and tools after adding by clicking its card.
addAgent.inheritOption: Inherit from chat (key at send time)
addAgent.noKeyHint: Choose a provider key above to select a model. Without a key, the agent inherits the chat's model at send time.

workflow.agentRemovedDesc: {name} has been removed from the pipeline.
workflow.resetLayoutTitle: Resets the nodes to their automatic position based on the mode
workflow.removeDescription: This agent will no longer take part in future runs. You can always add it again. Past runs keep their trace in the audit.

orchestrator.label: Maestro
orchestrator.pitch: Coordinates and synthesizes — delivers the final answer to the user.

drafting.label: Drafter
drafting.pitch: Drafts pleadings, briefs, and synthesis notes.

sequential.label: Sequential
sequential.pitch: Each agent sees the previous agents' output and builds on it. A → B → C.

council.label: Council
council.pitch: N rounds in which each member sees the others' positions and revises their own.

parallel.label: Parallel
parallel.pitch: All agents work in parallel; the last one synthesizes.

iterative.label: Iterative
iterative.pitch: The researcher revisits its notes each round to dig into the gaps, then the last agent synthesizes.

maestro.label: Maestro
maestro.pitch: The last agent leads: it chooses who to consult, with which instructions, and can re-delegate before answering.

avocat-affaires.label: Business lawyer
avocat-affaires.pitch: Defends the company's interests — protecting margins, controlling risk.

avocat-consommateur.label: Consumer lawyer
avocat-consommateur.pitch: Defends the weaker party — significant imbalance, unfair terms.

dpo.label: Senior DPO
dpo.pitch: GDPR compliance — legal basis, purposes, retention, DPIA.

compliance.label: Compliance officer
compliance.pitch: Cross-cutting regulatory compliance — Sapin II, AML-CFT, sanctions.

pragmatique.label: Pragmatist
pragmatique.pitch: Seeks the compromise that holds up in practice.

fiscaliste.label: Tax lawyer
fiscaliste.pitch: Tax optimization and risk — corporate tax, VAT, transfer pricing.
